mapper.select: select count(*) from department where com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED'

WITH dept_closure AS ( -- START WITH을 생략하면 조건을 만족하는 모든 행이 각각의 root가 되어 -- "부서별 하위트리(자기자신 포함)" 관계를 한 번의 CONNECT BY로 전개 SELECT CONNECT_BY_ROOT dept_id AS ancestor_dept_id, dept_id AS descendant_dept_id FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND dept_status != 'DELETED' CONNECT BY PRIOR dept_id = parent_id AND dept_status != 'DELETED' ), emp_count_per_dept AS ( SELECT dept_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM employee GROUP BY dept_id ), subtree_emp_count AS ( SELECT c.ancestor_dept_id AS dept_id, SUM(NVL(ec.cnt, 0)) AS emp_count FROM dept_closure c LEFT JOIN emp_count_per_dept ec ON ec.dept_id = c.descendant_dept_id GROUP BY c.ancestor_dept_id ) SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.parent_id, p.dept_name AS parent_name, d.emp_id AS leader_id, le.emp_name AS leader_name, NVL(sec.emp_count, 0) AS empCount FROM department d LEFT JOIN department p ON p.dept_id = d.parent_id LEFT JOIN employee le ON le.emp_id = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN subtree_emp_count sec ON sec.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE d.com_id = #{comId} AND d.dept_status != 'DELETED' START WITH d.parent_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR d.dept_id = d.parent_id AND d.dept_status != 'DELETED' ORDER SIBLINGS BY d.sort_order

WITH dept_subtree (dept_id) AS ( SELECT dept_id FROM department WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND dept_status != 'DELETED' UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_id FROM department d JOIN dept_subtree ds ON d.parent_id = ds.dept_id WHERE d.dept_status != 'DELETED' ) SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.com_id, d.parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name AS parent_name, d.emp_id AS leader_id, leader.emp_name AS leader_name, leader.emp_no AS leader_emp_no, leader_p.pos_name AS leader_pos_name, ec.emp_count AS empCount FROM department d LEFT JOIN department dp_parent ON dp_parent.dept_id = d.parent_id LEFT JOIN employee leader ON leader.emp_id = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN emp_position leader_p ON leader_p.pos_id = leader.pos_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS emp_count FROM employee e WHERE e.dept_id IN (SELECT dept_id FROM dept_subtree) ) ec ON 1 = 1 WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.dept_status != 'DELETED'
select coalesce(max(sort_order), 0) from department where com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' and (parent_id = #{parentId} OR (parent_id IS NULL AND #{parentId} IS NULL))
select count(*) from department where parent_id = #{deptId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED'
mapper.update:
update department
dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_code = #{deptCode},
parent_id = NULL, parent_id = #{parentId},
depth = #{depth}, emp_Id = #{empId},
where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: WITH childTree (dept_id) AS ( SELECT dept_id FROM department WHERE parent_id = #{deptId} AND dept_status != 'DELETED' UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_id FROM department d JOIN childTree c ON d.parent_id = c.dept_id WHERE d.dept_status != 'DELETED' ) SELECT dept_id FROM childTree

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS deptTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND depth = 1 AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS dept1Total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND depth in (2,3) AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS dept2Total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND emp_status = '재직') AS empTotal from DUAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE E JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE E.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED'
SELECT * FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} ORDER BY dept_name
